overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player walks past futuristic vending machines and massive digital billboards, enters a covered walkway with green neon archways, turns around at a dead end, and continues into an open plaza with palm trees and outdoor seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vending machines and advertisements

events.description: begins walking forward past the large curved digital billboard
approaching the entrance to the covered walkway with green neon archways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the littered concrete sidewalk past illuminated vending machines and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and dark vest walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian standing near the vending machines in the distance

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying a woman's face with glowing pink eyes and blue hair
row of illuminated vending machines with yellow and purple coloring displaying beverages
vertical black billboard with 'DYNALAR' and 'IT'S ALL ABOUT THE TOUCH' text
blue and yellow vending machine with 'DYNAMISM' text on the side
pavement scattered with paper trash and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk commercial sidewalk at night, dominated by a massive digital billboard showing a woman's face. The player walks past rows of illuminated yellow and purple vending machines while paper litter scatters the concrete ground. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the camera approaches a green neon archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon archways leading to building entrance

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the green neon archways
stops at the metal door with blue 'OPEN' interaction prompt visible
turns around 180 degrees to face back toward the archway exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit corridor to the dead end, examining the door and posters, then turning around

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the building entrance
pedestrian in red jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: series of rectangular metal archways outlined in bright green neon lights forming a tunnel effect
red neon sign with 'XXX' text indicating adult entertainment venue
tall digital display showing scrolling advertisements
three large illuminated vertical posters advertising 'WET DREAM' with anime-style artwork
metal door with blue 'OPEN' game interaction text floating in front

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway defined by striking green neon archways that create a tunnel effect. The environment shifts to a more enclosed space with 'XXX' neon signs and digital advertising kiosks. At the dead end, the player examines a metal door with game interaction text and 'WET DREAM' posters before turning around to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: exits the covered archway back to the open sidewalk area
turns right into the wider open plaza with corporate billboards

agents.ego_description: walking back through the archway and continuing past the starting point toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench in the plaza ahead

entered.detail: yellow vending machine with red 'BURRITO' neon text
large vertical digital billboard advertising '3 MONTHS 1 DESIRE' with 'Sasha Devon' text
tall white illuminated billboard with 'NC' and 'CORP' corporate logo
digital advertising screen knocked over and lying on the pavement
vertical digital sign showing 'TOO GOOD TO WASTE' advertisement with a woman's image

segments.scene_description: Walking back through the green neon archway, the player emerges into a transition area with new advertising elements including a 'BURRITO' vending machine and a large 'Sasha Devon' billboard. The scene opens up as the player turns toward a plaza featuring a fallen digital sign and corporate 'NC' branding against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and outdoor seating

events.description: lighting shifts from green neon to mixed purple, red, and white city lights
passing by multiple NPCs seated on concrete benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past palm trees and seated pedestrians, approaching the Bohemia club

notable_agents.action: person in colorful jacket sitting on concrete bench looking at phone
person in pink jacket and green pants sitting on bench

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'BOHEMIA' with 'XXX' symbol below it
tall palm trees with uplighting planted in rectangular grass beds
modern concrete seating arranged along the palm tree planters

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious urban plaza illuminated by vibrant red and purple neon lights. The player walks past rows of palm trees and concrete benches where NPCs are seated. The prominent 'BOHEMIA' club sign glows red on the left while the camera moves through this open public space with scattered pedestrians relaxing on the seating.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched commercial district that moves from an open sidewalk into a claustrophobic tunnel before emerging into a corporate plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk dominated by a massive digital billboard of a woman's face, passing rows of yellow and purple vending machines and scattered litter. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a covered walkway defined by a series of striking green neon archways and digital kiosks, eventually reaching a dead end marked by a metal door and posters. The scene then reverses direction, retreating through the green neon tunnel and past a burrito vending machine before the space opens up once more. Finally, the camera turns toward a wide plaza featuring a fallen digital sign and corporate branding set against the dark night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant urban plaza bathed in saturated neon light. It begins by entering a spacious public square where the atmosphere is dominated by glowing red and purple hues. As the camera advances, it glides past rows of palm trees and concrete benches occupied by relaxing pedestrians. The scene then opens further to reveal the prominent red glow of the Bohemia club sign on the left before continuing through the open pedestrian space.
